title: The Long Phone Call
content: Because they lived in different cities, Chloe and Ethan spoke on the phone almost every evening. One night, they started talking after dinner and did not notice the hours passing. They shared stories about work, childhood memories, future dreams, and funny moments from their day. When they finally looked at the time, it was already past midnight. They laughed and wished each other good night, knowing that no distance could make their conversations feel shorter.
